---
title: "owner-analysis"
author: Rafael Fernandez
format: html
---

<<<<<<< HEAD
x
=======
```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(here)
```


```{r}
lobster_abundance <- read_csv(here::here("data/Lobster_Abundance_All_Years_20220829.csv"))
```
thisdata looks like its analyzing all types of aquatic life at specific sites and at specific times
>>>>>>> 60318f1a8a2223befa7556964b430d0f8b28b956
